steps.title: Pin down what would weaken the claim
steps.content: The student claims joining an FTA increases the rate of growth of a country's agricultural exports. To weaken this, we need an example where joining an FTA did not increase growth — i.e., growth slowed or fell after joining.

steps.title: Match to the choice that shows post-FTA growth was lower
steps.content:
A and C both describe higher growth after joining — these support the claim. B only says growth was positive, with no comparison to before — too neutral.

D: Morocco's growth rate after MAFTA was lower than before, directly contradicting the claim that FTAs raise growth rates. D is correct.
